title: Delicate Peruvian Morcilla Papa Rellena
description: A malty, pillowy Peruvian dish featuring morcilla and a mirepoix base, perfect for a date night, pescatarian friendly, in the form of papa rellena.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Boil the potatoes until they are tender, then set them aside to cool.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onions, carrots, and celery until they are tender.
Add the morcilla to the skillet and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer raw.
Add the salt, black pepper, paprika, and garlic powder to the skillet and stir to combine.
Scoop out most of the flesh from the cooled potatoes, leaving a thin layer to hold the potato together.
Fill each potato with the morcilla mixture and top with additional potato flesh if needed.
Place the stuffed potatoes on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until they are golden brown.
